country.desc_zh: 墨西哥是北美洲面积第三大国，拥有约1.29亿人口，是全球最大的西班牙语国家之一。阿兹特克文明、玛雅文化与西班牙殖民历史交融，赋予了墨西哥极为丰富的文化底蕴。首都墨西哥城是拉丁美洲最大的都市之一，坐落于海拔2240米的高原盆地，空气稀薄对到访球队构成独特挑战。
country.desc_en: Mexico is the third-largest country in North America with around 129 million people and one of the world's largest Spanish-speaking nations. A fusion of Aztec, Maya, and Spanish colonial heritage gives Mexico an extraordinarily rich culture. Its capital, Mexico City, is one of Latin America's largest metropolises, sitting at 2,240 metres altitude — a unique physical challenge for visiting teams.
country.football_desc_zh: 足球是墨西哥的国民运动，"绿色风暴"（El Tri）深受全国亿万球迷的热爱。墨西哥球场以极致的氛围著称，阿兹特卡球场——世界上曾两次举办世界杯决赛的传奇场馆——是全球最令人生畏的主场之一。2026年世界杯，墨西哥作为三国联合主办国之一，将在这片热土上在主场球迷面前迎战强敌。
country.football_desc_en: Football is Mexico's national sport and El Tri commands the passion of millions. Mexican stadiums are famous for their electric atmosphere, with the Estadio Azteca — the only venue to have hosted two World Cup finals — among the most intimidating arenas on earth. As a co-host of the 2026 World Cup, Mexico plays its group stage matches in front of home crowds on familiar, high-altitude turf.

history.note_zh: 首届世界杯，全败出局，0-4大负法国
history.note_en: Debut World Cup; went winless, conceding four to France

history.note_zh: 主场举办，首次打入八强，1-4负于意大利
history.note_en: Host nation; reached the quarter-finals for the first time before losing 1-4 to Italy

history.note_zh: 再度主办，点球负于西德，史上最佳平级战绩
history.note_en: Co-hosted again; lost to West Germany on penalties — equalling their best result

history.note_zh: 点球负于保加利亚，开启连续7届十六强止步宿命
history.note_en: Lost to Bulgaria on penalties; beginning of a streak of seven consecutive Round-of-16 exits
Lost 1-2 to Argentina in extra time

history.note_zh: 1-3负于阿根廷，比格利亚惊艳演出
history.note_en: Lost 1-3 to Argentina; Tevez's disallowed goal overshadowed by Argentina's quality

history.note_zh: 0-1负于阿根廷，连续5届十六强止步
history.note_en: Lost 0-1 to Argentina — five consecutive Round-of-16 exits

history.note_zh: 0-2负于巴西，七届十六强魔咒终结
history.note_en: Lost 0-2 to Brazil; the curse of the fifth game persisted across seven tournaments

history.note_zh: 得失球差不敌波兰，时隔24年再度小组赛出局
history.note_en: Eliminated on goal difference behind Poland — group stage exit for the first time since 1978

history.note_zh: 分入A组，与韩国、南非、捷克同组；首战6月11日在阿兹特卡球场迎战南非
history.note_en: Drawn into Group A alongside South Korea, South Africa and Czech Republic; opener vs South Africa at Estadio Azteca on June 11

legends.name_zh: 哈维尔·埃尔南德斯（奇查里托）
legends.bio_zh: "小豌豆"是墨西哥史上最高产的射手，52粒国家队进球令其成为永恒的传奇。他在曼联、皇马、勒沃库森和西汉姆等欧洲豪门留下了印记，以敏锐的禁区嗅觉和出色的头球技术著称。2010年世界杯对阵阿根廷的那粒头球进球，让全世界记住了这位天生的射手。
legends.bio_en: Chicharito is Mexico's all-time leading scorer with 52 goals, cementing himself as a national legend. He excelled at Manchester United, Real Madrid, Bayer Leverkusen, and West Ham, renowned for his instinctive movement in the box and superb heading. His goal against Argentina at the 2010 World Cup announced him to the world.

legends.bio_zh: 瓜尔达多是墨西哥历史上出场次数最多的球员，180次代表国家队出场，参加了五届世界杯。这位技术全面、极具领袖气质的中场球员先后效力于比利亚雷亚尔、贝蒂斯等西甲俱乐部，是「El Tri」中场核心长达17年，以视野开阔和无私奉献精神被球迷铭记。
legends.bio_en: Andrés Guardado holds Mexico's all-time caps record with 180 appearances across five World Cups. A technically complete and inspirational midfielder, he starred for Villarreal and Real Betis in La Liga for 17 years. His vision, work rate, and selfless play made him the heartbeat of El Tri's midfield across two decades.

legends.bio_zh: 雨果·桑切斯被公认为拉丁美洲历史上最伟大的前锋之一，在皇家马德里赢得五连冠西甲联赛并摘得三次西甲最佳射手，其著名的后空翻庆祝动作享誉全球。他为墨西哥国家队打入29球，以技术精湛和无以伦比的进球能力展现了什么是顶级前锋艺术。
legends.bio_en: Hugo Sánchez is widely regarded as one of the greatest Latin American forwards of all time. He won five consecutive La Liga titles with Real Madrid and claimed the Pichichi (top scorer) award three times. His trademark somersault celebration is instantly recognisable worldwide. He scored 29 goals for Mexico, displaying an artistry that made him a global icon.

legends.bio_zh: 豪尔赫·坎波斯是世界足球史上最具个人风格的门将，以自制的花哨球衣、敏捷灵动的扑救技术和勇于出击的冒险风格而闻名。他身高仅1.73米，却多次出战前锋位置，130次代表国家队出场，是1994年和1998年世界杯的主力门将，留下无数精彩记忆。
legends.bio_en: Jorge Campos is one of football's most distinctive personalities — famous for his flamboyant self-designed kits, acrobatic saves, and adventurous shot-stopping. Standing just 1.73 m tall, he occasionally played as a forward. He earned 130 caps as Mexico's first-choice keeper at the 1994 and 1998 World Cups, leaving an indelible mark on the game.

legends.bio_zh: 布兰科是墨西哥足球史上最受爱戴的球员之一，以充满创意的技术动作和令人叹为观止的"青蛙跳"闻名于世。他在三届世界杯中（1998、2002、2010年）代表国家队出战，打进38球，是El Tri历史上的顶级进攻核心，退役后投身政坛并当选库埃纳瓦卡市长。
legends.bio_en: Cuauhtémoc Blanco is one of Mexico's most beloved footballers, famous for his creative dribbling and the legendary 'Blanco hop' — using his feet to catch the ball and spring past defenders. He appeared at three World Cups (1998, 2002, 2010) and scored 38 goals for Mexico before transitioning into politics and becoming mayor of Cuernavaca.

rivalries.desc_zh: 墨西哥与美国的对阵被称为「El Clásico de Concacaf」，是北美洲最具激情的足球宿怨。历史上墨西哥长期占据优势，但美国队近年来逐步缩短差距。2002年世界杯十六强赛美国2-0击败墨西哥，令El Tri球迷至今难以释怀。两队几乎在每届金杯赛和联合国家联赛中都会相遇，每次都是火花四溅。
rivalries.desc_en: The Mexico–USA match, known as El Clásico de Concacaf, is North America's fiercest football rivalry. Mexico historically dominated, but the USA has gradually closed the gap. The US's 2-0 win over Mexico at the 2002 World Cup remains a sore point for El Tri fans. The sides meet regularly in the Gold Cup and Nations League, and every match crackles with intensity.

rivalries.desc_zh: 墨西哥与阿根廷在世界杯十六强赛有着不可思议的宿命：两队在1998年至2010年连续四届世界杯淘汰赛中相遇，阿根廷每次都将墨西哥淘汰出局。这段痛苦的历史在墨西哥球迷中留下了深刻记忆，马拉多纳的阿根廷、梅西的阿根廷都曾是El Tri的克星。
rivalries.desc_en: Mexico and Argentina met in four consecutive World Cup Round-of-16 matches between 1998 and 2010 — Argentina prevailed every time. From Maradona's era to Messi's generation, Argentina has been El Tri's recurring nemesis on the World Cup stage, creating one of football's most improbable recurring fixtures.

rivalries.desc_zh: 墨西哥与巴西的宿怨承载着鲜明的拉丁美洲色彩。1970年世界杯四分之一决赛，巴西4-1击败东道主墨西哥，见证了贝利带领的巴西队走向巅峰。2018年世界杯，巴西2-0终结了El Tri的世界杯旅程，也终结了墨西哥连续七届在十六强的止步宿命——只是以最糟糕的方式终结。
rivalries.desc_en: Mexico and Brazil share a deep South American rivalry flavoured by Latin passion. In the 1970 World Cup quarter-final, Brazil swept past hosts Mexico 4-1 en route to lifting the trophy. In 2018, Brazil ended Mexico's World Cup campaign 2-0 — ironically the game that finally broke El Tri's seven-tournament Round-of-16 curse, though not in the way Mexicans hoped.

fun_facts.text_zh: 阿兹特卡球场是世界上唯一举办过两届世界杯决赛（1970年和1986年）的场馆，容纳8.7万名球迷，是全球最神圣的足球圣地之一
fun_facts.text_en: Estadio Azteca is the only venue to have hosted two World Cup finals (1970 and 1986); it holds 87,000 fans and remains one of football's most sacred grounds

fun_facts.text_zh: 墨西哥城海拔2240米，稀薄的空气令到访球队体力消耗加倍，这是主场优势中一项极为有利的自然因素
fun_facts.text_en: Mexico City's altitude of 2,240 metres significantly saps visiting teams' stamina, making it one of the most formidable natural home advantages in world football

fun_facts.text_zh: "第五场魔咒"是墨西哥球迷心中永远的痛：1994年至2018年，El Tri连续七届世界杯都在十六强止步，无一例外
fun_facts.text_en: The 'Curse of the Fifth Game' haunted Mexico for 24 years — El Tri was eliminated in the Round of 16 at seven consecutive World Cups from 1994 to 2018 without exception

fun_facts.text_zh: 哈维尔·阿吉雷是2026年世界杯唯一一位第三次率领同一支球队出征世界杯的主教练，他曾在2002年和2010年带领墨西哥打进十六强
fun_facts.text_en: Javier Aguirre is the only coach at the 2026 World Cup to be taking the same nation to the tournament for a third time, having previously led Mexico to the Round of 16 in 2002 and 2010

fun_facts.text_zh: 墨西哥是2026年世界杯三个联合主办国之一，与美国和加拿大共同承办，其中阿兹特卡球场将举办开幕式及首场揭幕战
fun_facts.text_en: Mexico is one of three co-hosts for the 2026 World Cup alongside the USA and Canada; the Estadio Azteca hosts the opening match — Mexico vs South Africa — marking the tournament's kick-off

fun_facts.text_zh: 奥乔亚若出征2026年世界杯，将成为史上参加世界杯次数最多的门将之一（6次），与德国传奇门将布伦斯·科尔纳并驾齐驱
fun_facts.text_en: If Ochoa makes the 2026 squad, he will become one of the most World Cup-experienced goalkeepers in history with six appearances, a remarkable feat of longevity
